FAQ_Description: Frequently Asked Questions about NostrTube. Find answers to common questions and learn more about our platform.
Terms_Description: Read the Legal Notice for NostrTube, a decentralized video sharing platform built on the Nostr protocol. Understand your rights and responsibilities while using our service.
search_page_description: Search and discover videos on NostrTube.
notFound_headline: Looks like you got lost in the Nostr universe
notFound_description: The route you tried to access doesn't exist or was removed. Use the shortcuts below to find what you're looking for.
notFound_tip: Tip: use {{link}} to search any content on the Nostr network.
explore_page_description: Discover new content, creators and communities of the Nostr ecosystem.
explore_tips_search: 🔍 Use search to find specific videos.
explore_tips_tags: 🏷️ Click on hashtags to discover related content.
explore_tips_follow: 👤 Follow creators to keep up with new videos.
explore_tips_zaps: ⚡ Support with Zaps the content you enjoy the most.
explore_empty_description: No content found on the consulted relays. Try changing the filters or searching by keywords.
explore_no_live: No live streams at the moment
explore_no_live_description: Live streams will appear here when available on the relays.
explore_cta_description: Use Zaps to directly support the creators you enjoy the most in the Nostr ecosystem.
subscriptions_description: Follow your favorite creators and never miss a new video.
subscriptions_playlists_empty: Playlists from channels you follow will appear here.
subscriptions_manage_description: Discover new creators and manage who you follow.
subscriptions_empty_not_following_desc: Follow creators to keep up with new videos, live streams and posts in your personalized feed.
subscriptions_empty_no_content_desc: The creators you follow haven't posted anything recently. New videos will appear here automatically.
subscriptions_no_videos_yet: No videos from followed creators yet.
subscriptions_no_videos_desc: The creators you follow haven't published videos yet.
subscriptions_no_live_now: None of your channels are live right now.
subscriptions_posts_coming_soon: Posts from your channels will appear here soon.
subscriptions_playlists_coming_soon: Playlists from your channels will appear here when available.
subscriptions_cta_description: Explore new channels, hashtags and content in the Nostr ecosystem.
live_page_description: Live streams from the Nostr community.
live_cta_description: Share your stream with the Nostr community. Use OBS, Streamlabs or any RTMP/HLS-compatible software — publish the link on Nostr with kind 30311.
live_tips_promote: Promote your live stream in advance
live_empty_title: No live streams at the moment
live_empty_description: We didn't find active live streams on the consulted relays. Live streams from the Nostr community will appear here when available.
library_description: Everything you've saved, organized and followed.
library_storage_description: Navigation data saved locally. Playlists and likes are stored on the Nostr network.
library_login_cta: Connect your Nostr key to see your videos, playlists and likes.
library_empty_description: Videos you upload, like, save to watch later or add to playlists will appear here.
library_playlists_empty_description: Create playlists to organize your favorite videos.
library_liked_empty_description: Likes will appear here when you like videos.
library_watchlater_empty_description: Save videos from the action menu to build your personal queue.
library_history_empty_description: Videos you watch will appear here.
library_myvideos_empty_title_loggedout: Log in to see your videos
library_myvideos_empty_description: Videos you upload will appear here.
library_myvideos_empty_description_logge: Connect your Nostr key to manage your videos.
library_drafts_empty_description: Drafts saved during upload will appear here for you to continue and publish later.
library_downloads_description: Offline downloads will be available soon. For now, you can use each video's menu to download individually.
zaps_page_description: Track rewards, support creators and view your attention economy.
zaps_login_title: Log in to see your Zaps
zaps_login_description: This screen uses real data from your NIP-57 receipts and supports. Without an active session, your personal metrics cannot be calculated.
zaps_loading_description: Fetching payments, supporters and campaigns from relays.
zaps_error_description: Please try again. Existing Zap buttons remain intact.
zaps_empty_description: When NIP-57 receipts or supports become visible on the consulted relays, this screen will show real activity without inventing monetary values.
zaps_top_supporters_description: Real ranking by sum of sats received.
zaps_top_supporters_empty: No identifiable supporters in the current period.
zaps_goals_card_description: Honest fallback while there's no real implementation of these entities.
zaps_goals_empty_description: We haven't found a real goals/campaigns structure in the current project.
zaps_tips_description: Small habits to strengthen the attention economy.
zaps_tip_3: Use goals to engage your audience.
zaps_support_description: Existing Zap buttons remain the main flow for payments.
zaps_metric_sent_desc: Detected by visible receipts in the period.
zaps_metric_creators_unavailable: No creator identified in the period.
zaps_metric_average_desc: Real average in the available period.
zaps_chart_description: Received in amber and sent in purple, using only real series.
zaps_chart_empty: Not enough data to build the chart yet.
zaps_best_video_desc: Video with the highest received amount.
zaps_best_video_unavailable: No video with received zaps identified.
zaps_top_supporter_desc: Pubkey/profile with the highest received amount.
zaps_top_supporter_unavailable: No supporter identified in the period.
zaps_current_goal_desc: Shown only if there's a real implementation.
zaps_goals_tab_desc: We haven't found a real goals model in this codebase.
zaps_campaigns_tab_desc: No real implementation found for Zap campaigns in this project.
zaps_activity_description: Real events received from the consulted relays.
user_not_found_description: The user you are looking for does not exist or has no published videos.
user_empty_playlists: No playlists created by this user.
user_about_empty_description: This profile hasn't added a description yet.
user_alerts_loading_desc: Fetching community alerts related to your videos.
user_alerts_empty: No alerts found for your videos.
user_dropdown_login_required: Please log in to update your mute list.
user_dropdown_already_muted: Profile was already on the mute list.
user_social_empty: No public network data found for this profile.
user_social_nodes_count: Showing {{count}} public profiles related by follows and recent followers.
relays_page_description: Connect to the Nostr network through multiple relays.
relays_empty_description: Add at least one secure relay to publish and read events on the Nostr network.
relays_metrics_description: Real data when available. Unavailable info remains marked as `—`.
relays_distribution_description: Recent events per relay when local cache provides this data.
relays_metrics_unavailable: Metric unavailable in current local cache.
relays_no_distribution_data: Not enough data for real distribution at the moment.
relays_tips_description: Best practices for maintaining a stable mesh.
relays_tip_1: Use multiple relays to reduce isolated failures.
relays_tip_2: Monitor latency before promoting a relay to primary.
relays_tip_3: Privacy first: prefer trusted and secure endpoints.
relays_add_description: Use `wss://` relays to ensure compatibility with the current pool. Configuration is persisted locally and synced immediately.
relays_error_insecure: Insecure relays with ws:// are not accepted. Use only wss://.
relays_error_invalid: Enter a valid relay starting with wss://.
relays_public_error_description: The public directory failed. Your current relays remain available in the main tab.
relays_public_empty_description: Try another search term or reload the public directory.
